notes: Use Notion MCP as the primary saved-view path for phase 2 execution databases.
Keep direct REST as the canonical path for schema, rows, markdown content, validation, and logs.
Only use Playwright if Notion MCP cannot complete the saved-view task.

views.name: Open Decisions
views.purpose: Show material project decisions that still need commitment.
views.configure: FILTER "Status" = "Proposed"; SORT BY "Proposed On" ASC; SHOW "Decision", "Status", "Decision Type", "Local Project", "Decision Owner", "Revisit By"

views.name: Decision Queue
views.purpose: See the decision flow grouped by status.
views.configure: GROUP BY "Status"; SHOW "Decision", "Decision Type", "Local Project", "Decision Owner", "Revisit By"

views.name: Decision History
views.purpose: Review committed and superseded decisions over time.
views.configure: SORT BY "Decided On" DESC; SHOW "Decision", "Status", "Decision Type", "Local Project", "Decided On", "Chosen Option"

views.name: Revisit Soon
views.purpose: Keep revisit dates visible even before formal premium reminders exist.
views.configure: SORT BY "Revisit By" ASC; SHOW "Decision", "Status", "Local Project", "Revisit By", "Expected Impact"

views.name: Now
views.purpose: Keep the one active weekly packet front and center.
views.configure: FILTER "Priority" = "Now"; SORT BY "Target Finish" ASC; SHOW "Packet", "Status", "Priority", "Local Project", "Target Finish", "Goal"

views.name: Standby
views.purpose: Show the one fallback packet that can replace the current work quickly.
views.configure: FILTER "Priority" = "Standby"; SORT BY "Target Start" ASC; SHOW "Packet", "Status", "Priority", "Local Project", "Target Start", "Why Now"

views.name: Blocked
views.purpose: Keep blocked packets visible and easy to clear.
views.configure: FILTER "Execution State" = "Blocked"; SORT BY "Target Finish" ASC; SHOW "Packet", "Status", "Local Project", "Driving Decision", "Blocker Summary"

views.name: Done This Week
views.configure: FILTER "Execution State" = "Done"; SORT BY "Target Finish" DESC; SHOW "Packet", "Local Project", "Target Finish", "Goal"

views.name: By Project
views.purpose: Review packet history in project context without embedding giant databases elsewhere.
views.configure: SHOW "Packet", "Local Project", "Status", "Priority", "Packet Type", "Target Finish"; SORT BY "Target Finish" DESC

views.name: Rollover Risk
views.purpose: Spot packets that keep slipping so they can be narrowed or dropped.
views.configure: SORT BY "Rollover Count" DESC; SHOW "Packet", "Local Project", "Status", "Rollover Count", "Why Now"

views.name: My Tasks
views.purpose: Give the operator a simple daily execution inbox.
views.configure: SHOW "Task", "Status", "Assignee", "Due Date", "Priority", "Work Packet", "Local Project"; SORT BY "Due Date" ASC

views.name: Today
views.purpose: Keep the near-term task horizon clean and visible.
views.configure: SORT BY "Due Date" ASC; SHOW "Task", "Status", "Due Date", "Priority", "Work Packet"

views.name: This Week
views.purpose: Show the weekly execution flow without turning this into a heavy sprint board.
views.configure: SORT BY "Due Date" ASC; SHOW "Task", "Status", "Due Date", "Priority", "Task Type", "Work Packet", "Local Project"

views.name: Blocked
views.purpose: Keep blocked task work visible enough to clear fast.
views.configure: FILTER "Execution State" = "Blocked"; SORT BY "Due Date" ASC; SHOW "Task", "Due Date", "Priority", "Work Packet", "Task Notes"

views.name: By Packet
views.purpose: Review packet-level task flow from one place.
views.configure: SHOW "Task", "Work Packet", "Status", "Due Date", "Priority", "Local Project"; SORT BY "Due Date" ASC

views.name: Ready Queue
views.purpose: Surface tasks that are ready to be pulled into active work.
views.configure: FILTER "Execution State" = "Ready"; SORT BY "Due Date" ASC; SHOW "Task", "Due Date", "Priority", "Work Packet", "Local Project"
